note: seq=2 (small/fetch+sha-pin): 3-min persistent cadence; fetch Overture importer+wrapper from repo; verify sha; 10k test load

steps.note: seq=2 small apply: 3-min timer + fetch+verify+run Overture

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS auto-installer every 3 min

[Timer]
OnBootSec=2min
OnUnitActiveSec=3min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-autopull.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,sys,urllib.request as u; os.makedirs('/opt/atlas/importers',exist_ok=True); base=sys.argv[1]; [u.urlretrieve(base+'/scripts/'+f,'/opt/atlas/importers/'+f) for f in ('overture_pg_import.py','run_overture_test.sh')]" "$BRAIN_URL"

/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/overture_pg_import.py':'8a59f4c638fc7045092304be671b8a36604b2281d8f4e01d64d7db7c775294f0','/opt/atlas/importers/run_overture_test.sh':'fee1e756a15c8228bbf9cf33468e25f380ec30004a54e9ea6bfbd13c4c5b41f8'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
